overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a historic Southern city (Saint Denis). The character traverses cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passes wooden buildings with balconies including the 'J. Campbell Undertaker' establishment, and enters a narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with wooden storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street past wooden buildings and gas street lamps

notable_agents.action: person standing in the doorway of the wooden building on the right

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with covered porch and warm interior lighting
tall cast-iron gas lamp post emitting warm yellow light
wooden slatted bench positioned on the left side of the street
large trees with Spanish moss hanging from branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing wooden buildings with glowing windows and gas street lamps. A park bench sits on the left side near trees draped with Spanish moss, while a lone figure stands in a doorway on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense historic street with balconies and undertaker parlor

events.description: passing a two-story wooden building with people visible on the upper balcony
approaching the J. Campbell Undertaker building with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing close to buildings and observing the undertaker establishment

notable_agents.action: two people standing on the wooden balcony of the two-story building, observing the street
person leaning against the wall near the undertaker entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with second-floor balcony and railings
wooden balcony with people standing, overlooking the street
two-story building with large painted sign reading J. Campbell Undertaker
painted wooden sign with gold lettering identifying the undertaker business

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a two-story wooden building where people stand on the balcony, then approaches the J. Campbell Undertaker parlor. The street remains wet from rain, reflecting the warm gaslight. A horse-drawn wagon is parked on the left, and a figure leans against the undertaker's wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick and wooden buildings

events.description: turning right into a narrow alleyway between tall brick walls

agents.ego_description: turning into the narrow alley and proceeding deeper into the enclosed passage

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing in the alleyway ahead near a light source

entered.detail: tight cobblestone passage between tall buildings with overhanging structures
tall red brick wall with weathered texture on the left side of the alley
external wooden staircase attached to the building on the left
gas lamp mounted on the right wall illuminating the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow, enclosed alleyway between brick walls, leaving the main street behind. The space is tighter and more claustrophobic, lit by wall-mounted gas lamps. Rain continues to fall in the sheltered passage, and a distant figure stands ahead near wooden stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked city street that gradually narrows into a claustrophobic urban alleyway. It begins by tracking the character along wet cobblestones past glowing windows and gas lamps, moving beneath trees draped in Spanish moss. As the character advances, the scene opens up to reveal a two-story wooden building with figures on a balcony and the J. Campbell Undertaker parlor, where the warm streetlights reflect off the damp ground and a parked horse-drawn wagon. The camera then shifts direction, turning right away from the main thoroughfare and entering a tight passage enclosed by high brick walls. Finally, the environment transforms into a sheltered, dimly lit alley where rain continues to fall around wall-mounted lamps and a distant figure waiting by wooden stairs.
